TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Misa'alingayay no ina == Iti:ya ho, ira ko mo'etepay cidal i kakarayan, caay paka hadidi to fa'edet ko 'Amis a tamdaw, ma'icang to ko 'alo, awaay to ko nananomen, caay to kalengaw ko pinaloma, caay ka nga'ay ko 'orip no finawlan, misaharaterateng ko finawlan, ano haen sa i, awaay ko 'epoc, orasaka, pasowal sato ko fa'inayan no niyaro': "O kamiay to ko mipana'ay to cidal, talaen ko pipana' niyam to cidal, ta manga'ay to ko 'orip no mita to ikor." saan, orasaka, malalemid to ko fa'inayan no 'Amis tonini a demak. Nikawrira, halafin to i, hato caay ho ka tefad ko cidal, caay ka fana'en koya fa'inayan talacowaay to, awaayto patiko a minokay, awaay ko paratohay. Oya i loma'ay a fafahiyan i, caay ka nga'ay nangra a maomah, awaay ko 'epoc. Itiya, ira ko cecay a fafahiyan ci Laya, pasowal sa: "Ano matira caay pakasalof ko fa'inayan tonini a demak i, kami to o fafahiyan ko milepelay to cidal." sato. Masasowasowal to ci Laya ato pina a fafahiyan, mipa'ecas cangra to kafana'an nangra a tenooy, o sapilepel to cidal, oya caayay ka kari'ang no cidal a nitenooyan a salil, sapatala to sapilepel, salilen nangra koya mikari'angay i cangraan a cidal. Itira cangra i fafa'ed no kilang a mikalic, takopen nangra o maminokay ko cidal itiya, hacecayen nangra a milepel, mahaenay saka malepel nangra ko papitoay a cidal itiya. Pacekok koya 'osaw toloay a cidal, ci'icelay aca koya fafahiyan sato. Matalaw to koya toloay a cidal, matalaw ano hakowaay o mamatekop to, nanoya tayra sato i ka'ayaw no fafahiyan no 'Amis a mingitangit, harateng sato koya fafahiyan no 'Amis: "so'elinay to, ira ko sapadang no cidal." Saka masasowasowal to cangra, pa'ecas miocor ci Layaan masasowal to cidal. Pasowal sa ci Laya: "Materek kamo manga'ay to, nika caay ka nga'ay namo malecad k kasadak i kakarayan, ano haenen namo a caayto kafa'edeten kami." han ningra i, paca'of sa ko cidal: "Samaanen niyam ka? Ano caayto pipatay kamo i tamiyanan, samaanen asa kamo, doedo han to niyam." sato. Pasowal ci Laya: "Malatihi kamo caay paka hadidi kami to fa'edet, orasaka, malaliyas kamo i kakarayan, milowan to fa'edet; 'osaw namo tosaay i lomi'ad ato dadaya a masadak, ano haenen namo i, caay pipatay kami i tamowanan, a caay to ka latatiih kami." Oya toloay sato a cidal manga'ay ko nian sato, hayda sato itiya. Nanoya, o cecay a cidal "Hong" sa ko soni i kakarayan a malopisak malafo'is to; o cecay mala folad to, masadak to dadaya; o cecay a cidal oya to caay ka falic, nika, dengan i romi'ad a masadak. Nanoyaan, sanga'ay sato ko 'orip no 'Amis a finacadan to ikor. Manga'ay to cangra a maomah, matayal, ira to ko kaka'enen a ma'orip to romi'ami'ad. Tada manga'ay ko nidemakan no fafahiyan sato koya fa'inayan no finacadan, mangodo to ko fa'inayan to fafahiyan, orasaka, ano mitelek ho cangra to dademaken to 'ayaw i milicay ho to fafahiyan, oya fafahiyan to ko mitelekay to kalodemademak, matiniay saka, o fafahiyan ito ko kakeridan no 'Amis a finacadan. O nian koya nisowalan to "misa'alingayay no ina no 'Amis" a lekakawa.
S.PHON: == misaʡaɾiŋajaj no~u ina == iti:ja ħo~u, ira ko~u mo~uʡətəpaj ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ i kakarajan, ʦaaj paka ħaɬ~ɮiɬ~ɮi to~u faʡəɬ~ɮət ko~u ʡamis a tamɬ~ɮaw, maʡiʦaŋ to~u ko~u ʡaɾo~u, awaaj to~u ko~u nanano~umən, ʦaaj to~u kaɾəŋaw ko~u pinaɾo~uma, ʦaaj ka ŋaʡaj ko~u ʡo~urip no~u finawɾan, misaħaratəratəŋ ko~u finawɾan, ano~u ħaən sa i, awaaj ko~u ʡəpo~uʦ, o~urasaka, paso~uwaɾ sato~u ko~u faʡinajan no~u nijaro~uʡ: "o~u kamiaj to~u ko~u mipanaʡaj to~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ, taɾaən ko~u pipanaʡ nijam to~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ, ta maŋaʡaj to~u ko~u ʡo~urip no~u mita to~u iko~ur." saan, o~urasaka, maɾaɾəmiɬ~ɮ to~u ko~u faʡinajan no~u ʡamis to~unini a ɬ~ɮəmak. nikawrira, ħaɾafin to~u i, ħato~u ʦaaj ħo~u ka təfaɬ~ɮ ko~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ, ʦaaj ka fanaʡən ko~uja faʡinajan taɾaʦo~uwaaj to~u, awaajto~u patiko~u a mino~ukaj, awaaj ko~u parato~uħaj. o~uja i ɾo~umaʡaj a fafaħijan i, ʦaaj ka ŋaʡaj naŋra a mao~umaħ, awaaj ko~u ʡəpo~uʦ. itija, ira ko~u ʦəʦaj a fafaħijan ʦi ɾaja, paso~uwaɾ sa: "ano~u matira ʦaaj pakasaɾo~uf ko~u faʡinajan to~unini a ɬ~ɮəmak i, kami to~u o~u fafaħijan ko~u miɾəpəɾaj to~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ." sato~u. masaso~uwaso~uwaɾ to~u ʦi ɾaja ato~u pina a fafaħijan, mipaʡəʦas ʦaŋra to~u kafanaʡan naŋra a təno~uo~uj, o~u sapiɾəpəɾ to~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ, o~uja ʦaajaj ka kariʡaŋ no~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ a nitəno~uo~ujan a saɾiɾ, sapataɾa to~u sapiɾəpəɾ, saɾiɾən naŋra ko~uja mikariʡaŋaj i ʦaŋraan a ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ. itira ʦaŋra i fafaʡəɬ~ɮ no~u kiɾaŋ a mikaɾiʦ, tako~upən naŋra o~u mamino~ukaj ko~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ itija, ħaʦəʦajən naŋra a miɾəpəɾ, maħaənaj saka maɾəpəɾ naŋra ko~u papito~uaj a ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ itija. paʦəko~uk ko~uja ʡo~usaw to~uɾo~uaj a ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ, ʦiʡiʦəɾaj aʦa ko~uja fafaħijan sato~u. mataɾaw to~u ko~uja to~uɾo~uaj a ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ, mataɾaw ano~u ħako~uwaaj o~u mamatəko~up to~u, nano~uja tajra sato~u i kaʡajaw no~u fafaħijan no~u ʡamis a miŋitaŋit, ħaratəŋ sato~u ko~uja fafaħijan no~u ʡamis: "so~uʡəɾinaj to~u, ira ko~u sapaɬ~ɮaŋ no~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ." saka masaso~uwaso~uwaɾ to~u ʦaŋra, paʡəʦas mio~uʦo~ur ʦi ɾajaan masaso~uwaɾ to~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ. paso~uwaɾ sa ʦi ɾaja: "matərək kamo~u maŋaʡaj to~u, nika ʦaaj ka ŋaʡaj namo~u maɾəʦaɬ~ɮ k kasaɬ~ɮak i kakarajan, ano~u ħaənən namo~u a ʦaajto~u kafaʡəɬ~ɮətən kami." ħan niŋra i, paʦaʡo~uf sa ko~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ: "samaanən nijam ka? ano~u ʦaajto~u pipataj kamo~u i tamijanan, samaanən asa kamo~u, ɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u ħan to~u nijam." sato~u. paso~uwaɾ ʦi ɾaja: "maɾatiħi kamo~u ʦaaj paka ħaɬ~ɮiɬ~ɮi kami to~u faʡəɬ~ɮət, o~urasaka, maɾaɾijas kamo~u i kakarajan, miɾo~uwan to~u faʡəɬ~ɮət; ʡo~usaw namo~u to~usaaj i ɾo~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ato~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaja a masaɬ~ɮak, ano~u ħaənən namo~u i, ʦaaj pipataj kami i tamo~uwanan, a ʦaaj to~u ka ɾatatiiħ kami." o~uja to~uɾo~uaj sato~u a ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ maŋaʡaj ko~u nian sato~u, ħajɬ~ɮa sato~u itija. nano~uja, o~u ʦəʦaj a ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ "ħo~uŋ" sa ko~u so~uni i kakarajan a maɾo~upisak maɾafo~uʡis to~u; o~u ʦəʦaj maɾa fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ to~u, masaɬ~ɮak to~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaja; o~u ʦəʦaj a ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ o~uja to~u ʦaaj ka faɾiʦ, nika, ɬ~ɮəŋan i ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ a masaɬ~ɮak. nano~ujaan, saŋaʡaj sato~u ko~u ʡo~urip no~u ʡamis a finaʦaɬ~ɮan to~u iko~ur. maŋaʡaj to~u ʦaŋra a mao~umaħ, matajaɾ, ira to~u ko~u kakaʡənən a maʡo~urip to~u ro~umiʡamiʡaɬ~ɮ. taɬ~ɮa maŋaʡaj ko~u niɬ~ɮəmakan no~u fafaħijan sato~u ko~uja faʡinajan no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan, maŋo~uɬ~ɮo~u to~u ko~u faʡinajan to~u fafaħijan, o~urasaka, ano~u mitəɾək ħo~u ʦaŋra to~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakən to~u ʡajaw i miɾiʦaj ħo~u to~u fafaħijan, o~uja fafaħijan to~u ko~u mitəɾəkaj to~u kaɾo~uɬ~ɮəmaɬ~ɮəmak, matiniaj saka, o~u fafaħijan ito~u ko~u kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u ʡamis a finaʦaɬ~ɮan. o~u nian ko~uja niso~uwaɾan to~u "misaʡaɾiŋajaj no~u ina no~u ʡamis" a ɾəkakawa.
S.FORM: == Misa'alingayay no ina == Iti:ya ho, ira ko mo'etepay cidal i kakarayan, caay paka hadidi to fa'edet ko 'Amis a tamdaw, ma'icang to ko 'alo, awaay to ko nananomen, caay to kalengaw ko pinaloma, caay ka nga'ay ko 'orip no finawlan, misaharaterateng ko finawlan, ano haen sa i, awaay ko 'epoc, orasaka, pasowal sato ko fa'inayan no niyaro': "O kamiay to ko mipana'ay to cidal, talaen ko pipana' niyam to cidal, ta manga'ay to ko 'orip no mita to ikor." saan, orasaka, malalemid to ko fa'inayan no 'Amis tonini a demak. Nikawrira, halafin to i, hato caay ho ka tefad ko cidal, caay ka fana'en koya fa'inayan talacowaay to, awaayto patiko a minokay, awaay ko paratohay. Oya i loma'ay a fafahiyan i, caay ka nga'ay nangra a maomah, awaay ko 'epoc. Itiya, ira ko cecay a fafahiyan ci Laya, pasowal sa: "Ano matira caay pakasalof ko fa'inayan tonini a demak i, kami to o fafahiyan ko milepelay to cidal." sato. Masasowasowal to ci Laya ato pina a fafahiyan, mipa'ecas cangra to kafana'an nangra a tenooy, o sapilepel to cidal, oya caayay ka kari'ang no cidal a nitenooyan a salil, sapatala to sapilepel, salilen nangra koya mikari'angay i cangraan a cidal. Itira cangra i fafa'ed no kilang a mikalic, takopen nangra o maminokay ko cidal itiya, hacecayen nangra a milepel, mahaenay saka malepel nangra ko papitoay a cidal itiya. Pacekok koya 'osaw toloay a cidal, ci'icelay aca koya fafahiyan sato. Matalaw to koya toloay a cidal, matalaw ano hakowaay o mamatekop to, nanoya tayra sato i ka'ayaw no fafahiyan no 'Amis a mingitangit, harateng sato koya fafahiyan no 'Amis: "so'elinay to, ira ko sapadang no cidal." Saka masasowasowal to cangra, pa'ecas miocor ci Layaan masasowal to cidal. Pasowal sa ci Laya: "Materek kamo manga'ay to, nika caay ka nga'ay namo malecad k kasadak i kakarayan, ano haenen namo a caayto kafa'edeten kami." han ningra i, paca'of sa ko cidal: "Samaanen niyam ka? Ano caayto pipatay kamo i tamiyanan, samaanen asa kamo, doedo han to niyam." sato. Pasowal ci Laya: "Malatihi kamo caay paka hadidi kami to fa'edet, orasaka, malaliyas kamo i kakarayan, milowan to fa'edet; 'osaw namo tosaay i lomi'ad ato dadaya a masadak, ano haenen namo i, caay pipatay kami i tamowanan, a caay to ka latatiih kami." Oya toloay sato a cidal manga'ay ko nian sato, hayda sato itiya. Nanoya, o cecay a cidal "Hong" sa ko soni i kakarayan a malopisak malafo'is to; o cecay mala folad to, masadak to dadaya; o cecay a cidal oya to caay ka falic, nika, dengan i romi'ad a masadak. Nanoyaan, sanga'ay sato ko 'orip no 'Amis a finacadan to ikor. Manga'ay to cangra a maomah, matayal, ira to ko kaka'enen a ma'orip to romi'ami'ad. Tada manga'ay ko nidemakan no fafahiyan sato koya fa'inayan no finacadan, mangodo to ko fa'inayan to fafahiyan, orasaka, ano mitelek ho cangra to dademaken to 'ayaw i milicay ho to fafahiyan, oya fafahiyan to ko mitelekay to kalodemademak, matiniay saka, o fafahiyan ito ko kakeridan no 'Amis a finacadan. O nian koya nisowalan to "misa'alingayay no ina no 'Amis" a lekakawa.
S.PHON: == misaʡaɾiŋajaj no~u ina == iti:ja ħo~u, ira ko~u mo~uʡətəpaj ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ i kakarajan, ʦaaj paka ħaɬ~ɮiɬ~ɮi to~u faʡəɬ~ɮət ko~u ʡamis a tamɬ~ɮaw, maʡiʦaŋ to~u ko~u ʡaɾo~u, awaaj to~u ko~u nanano~umən, ʦaaj to~u kaɾəŋaw ko~u pinaɾo~uma, ʦaaj ka ŋaʡaj ko~u ʡo~urip no~u finawɾan, misaħaratəratəŋ ko~u finawɾan, ano~u ħaən sa i, awaaj ko~u ʡəpo~uʦ, o~urasaka, paso~uwaɾ sato~u ko~u faʡinajan no~u nijaro~uʡ: "o~u kamiaj to~u ko~u mipanaʡaj to~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ, taɾaən ko~u pipanaʡ nijam to~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ, ta maŋaʡaj to~u ko~u ʡo~urip no~u mita to~u iko~ur." saan, o~urasaka, maɾaɾəmiɬ~ɮ to~u ko~u faʡinajan no~u ʡamis to~unini a ɬ~ɮəmak. nikawrira, ħaɾafin to~u i, ħato~u ʦaaj ħo~u ka təfaɬ~ɮ ko~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ, ʦaaj ka fanaʡən ko~uja faʡinajan taɾaʦo~uwaaj to~u, awaajto~u patiko~u a mino~ukaj, awaaj ko~u parato~uħaj. o~uja i ɾo~umaʡaj a fafaħijan i, ʦaaj ka ŋaʡaj naŋra a mao~umaħ, awaaj ko~u ʡəpo~uʦ. itija, ira ko~u ʦəʦaj a fafaħijan ʦi ɾaja, paso~uwaɾ sa: "ano~u matira ʦaaj pakasaɾo~uf ko~u faʡinajan to~unini a ɬ~ɮəmak i, kami to~u o~u fafaħijan ko~u miɾəpəɾaj to~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ." sato~u. masaso~uwaso~uwaɾ to~u ʦi ɾaja ato~u pina a fafaħijan, mipaʡəʦas ʦaŋra to~u kafanaʡan naŋra a təno~uo~uj, o~u sapiɾəpəɾ to~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ, o~uja ʦaajaj ka kariʡaŋ no~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ a nitəno~uo~ujan a saɾiɾ, sapataɾa to~u sapiɾəpəɾ, saɾiɾən naŋra ko~uja mikariʡaŋaj i ʦaŋraan a ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ. itira ʦaŋra i fafaʡəɬ~ɮ no~u kiɾaŋ a mikaɾiʦ, tako~upən naŋra o~u mamino~ukaj ko~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ itija, ħaʦəʦajən naŋra a miɾəpəɾ, maħaənaj saka maɾəpəɾ naŋra ko~u papito~uaj a ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ itija. paʦəko~uk ko~uja ʡo~usaw to~uɾo~uaj a ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ, ʦiʡiʦəɾaj aʦa ko~uja fafaħijan sato~u. mataɾaw to~u ko~uja to~uɾo~uaj a ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ, mataɾaw ano~u ħako~uwaaj o~u mamatəko~up to~u, nano~uja tajra sato~u i kaʡajaw no~u fafaħijan no~u ʡamis a miŋitaŋit, ħaratəŋ sato~u ko~uja fafaħijan no~u ʡamis: "so~uʡəɾinaj to~u, ira ko~u sapaɬ~ɮaŋ no~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ." saka masaso~uwaso~uwaɾ to~u ʦaŋra, paʡəʦas mio~uʦo~ur ʦi ɾajaan masaso~uwaɾ to~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ. paso~uwaɾ sa ʦi ɾaja: "matərək kamo~u maŋaʡaj to~u, nika ʦaaj ka ŋaʡaj namo~u maɾəʦaɬ~ɮ k kasaɬ~ɮak i kakarajan, ano~u ħaənən namo~u a ʦaajto~u kafaʡəɬ~ɮətən kami." ħan niŋra i, paʦaʡo~uf sa ko~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ: "samaanən nijam ka? ano~u ʦaajto~u pipataj kamo~u i tamijanan, samaanən asa kamo~u, ɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u ħan to~u nijam." sato~u. paso~uwaɾ ʦi ɾaja: "maɾatiħi kamo~u ʦaaj paka ħaɬ~ɮiɬ~ɮi kami to~u faʡəɬ~ɮət, o~urasaka, maɾaɾijas kamo~u i kakarajan, miɾo~uwan to~u faʡəɬ~ɮət; ʡo~usaw namo~u to~usaaj i ɾo~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ato~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaja a masaɬ~ɮak, ano~u ħaənən namo~u i, ʦaaj pipataj kami i tamo~uwanan, a ʦaaj to~u ka ɾatatiiħ kami." o~uja to~uɾo~uaj sato~u a ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ maŋaʡaj ko~u nian sato~u, ħajɬ~ɮa sato~u itija. nano~uja, o~u ʦəʦaj a ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ "ħo~uŋ" sa ko~u so~uni i kakarajan a maɾo~upisak maɾafo~uʡis to~u; o~u ʦəʦaj maɾa fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ to~u, masaɬ~ɮak to~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaja; o~u ʦəʦaj a ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ o~uja to~u ʦaaj ka faɾiʦ, nika, ɬ~ɮəŋan i ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ a masaɬ~ɮak. nano~ujaan, saŋaʡaj sato~u ko~u ʡo~urip no~u ʡamis a finaʦaɬ~ɮan to~u iko~ur. maŋaʡaj to~u ʦaŋra a mao~umaħ, matajaɾ, ira to~u ko~u kakaʡənən a maʡo~urip to~u ro~umiʡamiʡaɬ~ɮ. taɬ~ɮa maŋaʡaj ko~u niɬ~ɮəmakan no~u fafaħijan sato~u ko~uja faʡinajan no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan, maŋo~uɬ~ɮo~u to~u ko~u faʡinajan to~u fafaħijan, o~urasaka, ano~u mitəɾək ħo~u ʦaŋra to~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakən to~u ʡajaw i miɾiʦaj ħo~u to~u fafaħijan, o~uja fafaħijan to~u ko~u mitəɾəkaj to~u kaɾo~uɬ~ɮəmaɬ~ɮəmak, matiniaj saka, o~u fafaħijan ito~u ko~u kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u ʡamis a finaʦaɬ~ɮan. o~u nian ko~uja niso~uwaɾan to~u "misaʡaɾiŋajaj no~u ina no~u ʡamis" a ɾəkakawa.
